overall.description: A slow exploration of the Hogwarts house point hourglasses in a dimly lit gothic hall, with the camera panning left across the Slytherin, Ravenclaw, and Hufflepuff hourglasses while students walk in the background. The footage is from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) featuring high-quality cinematic lighting and detailed stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with house point hourglasses

agents.ego_description: slowly moving through the hall observing the intricate house hourglasses

entered.detail: tall hourglass with green gems and serpentine metal frame representing Slytherin house
tall hourglass with blue gems and eagle-topped ornate frame representing Ravenclaw house
pointed gothic stone archway with intricate carvings in the background
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a close view of the Slytherin and Ravenclaw house point hourglasses in a dimly lit gothic hall. The camera moves slowly left, revealing detailed stone architecture and marble floors. The atmosphere is quiet and empty, with warm torchlight illuminating the ornate metalwork of the hourglasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with house banners and hourglasses

events.description: Gryffindor banner and lit wall torch come into view on the left wall
Hufflepuff hourglass with golden accents becomes visible on the left
First NPC student in dark robes appears walking in the background

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left across the hall, revealing the remaining house hourglass and banners

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking away from the camera toward the archway

entered.detail: tall hourglass with golden/yellow gems and badger-themed frame representing Hufflepuff house
red wall banner with golden lion crest representing Gryffindor house
lit torch mounted on the stone wall providing warm flickering light

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues moving left, the Hufflepuff hourglass and Gryffindor banner enter the frame, completing the view of all four house representations. The warm torchlight reveals more of the stone architecture, and the first students appear in the background, adding life to the previously empty hall. The Slytherin hourglass recedes into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall entrance with decorative rug and large archway

events.description: Multiple students become visible walking and standing in the hall
Camera movement slows as it approaches the large stone archway at the end of the hall

agents.ego_description: observing the wider hall with multiple students while approaching the large archway exit

notable_agents.action: student standing still near the stone archway facing away from camera
student walking across the hall from left to right in the background

entered.detail: large gothic stone doorway with heavy wooden doors at the end of the hall
long patterned carpet runner on the marble floor with intricate designs

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the full width of the great hall, with the Hufflepuff hourglass now centered and the Slytherin hourglass exiting the frame. Multiple students are scattered throughout the space, some walking and some standing near the large stone archway at the end. The camera slows as it approaches the decorative rug and grand archway, concluding the pan across the iconic house point display area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous pan across a dimly lit gothic hall that transforms from an intimate view of house point hourglasses into a wide vista of the bustling Great Hall. It begins with a close-up of the Slytherin and Ravenclaw hourglasses, moving left across marble floors illuminated by warm torchlight. As the camera continues its trajectory, the Hufflepuff hourglass and Gryffindor banner enter the frame while the first students appear in the background, bringing life to the previously quiet space. The scene then expands to reveal the full width of the hall, with the Slytherin hourglass receding from view as multiple students gather near a large stone archway. The movement finally slows as the camera approaches a decorative rug and the grand architecture of the hall's interior.
